SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse.description: Main dictionary loader SP. Truncate-and-reload pattern from DWH_staging tables.

common_transforms.InsertDate: GETDATE() — not from source (on tables that have it)
common_transforms.StatusID: Hardcoded to 1 (on tables that have it)
common_transforms.DWH*ID_columns: Often set to same value as source PK (e.g. DWHCompensationID = CompensationReasonID)
common_transforms.ID_0_placeholder: Many tables get an INSERT of ID=0 with N/A name for fact table JOINs

SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse.known_bug_FeeOperationTypes: INSERT without preceding TRUNCATE causes duplicate rows to accumulate on each ETL run. Only 3 distinct FeeOperationTypeIDs but 299+ rows.

SP_Dictionaries_Country_DL_To_Synapse.description: Dedicated multi-step ETL for Dim_Country + Dim_CountryIPAnonymous. INSERT from 2 staging sources, then 3 UPDATE passes from external tables.

derived_columns.IsHighRiskCountry: CASE WHEN RiskGroupID IN (0,4) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

SP_Dim_Channel.description: Separate SP for Dim_Channel. Reads from Ext_Dim_SubChannel_UnifyCode, applies Organic/Paid classification.

SP_Dim_Affiliate.description: Separate SP for Dim_Affiliate. Derives ContractType via CASE expression on ContractName text.

SP_Dim_HistorySplitRatio_DL_To_Synapse.description: Dedicated SP for Dim_HistorySplitRatio. Loads stock split/corporate action ratios with date ranges.

dead_tables.reason: ETL INSERT is commented out in SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse. Only placeholder row (ID=0).
Loaded from DWH_Migration, no active ETL. Frozen data from Synapse migration.
No ETL loader SP found anywhere. Table exists but has 0 rows.
No ETL. Manually loaded frozen dictionary (9 rows). All InsertDate/UpdateDate NULL. DWH-internal lookup.
No active ETL. All rows dated 2018-10-02. Frozen since then.
No active ETL. InsertDate/UpdateDate all NULL. Manually loaded mapping table.
No active ETL. UpdateDate all NULL. 6 rows from IP2Location reference docs.
No active ETL in SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse (section commented out). Frozen at 4 rows from Synapse migration. Production has 8+ values.
No ETL found. Static 4 rows (Undefined/Web/IOS/Android). Likely manual or one-time migration load.
Table dropped from DWH. ETL section commented out in SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse. No DDL in SSDT.

schema_drift_patterns: Production DisplayName columns are frequently dropped (BonusType, CompensationReason)
Production flag columns (IsActive, IsTaxable, IsCashflowForGain, IsShownInHistory) often dropped
Name columns sometimes renamed to include table prefix (Name → CashoutFeeGroupName, Name → ClientWithdrawReasonName)
Production Identity columns become nullable int in Synapse (no IDENTITY support)
HistoryCosts staging column CostConfigurationId (the name field) is renamed to CostConfiguration in DWH to avoid collision with the ID column
Dim_Currency includes 15.7K rows (fiat + commodities + instruments) despite the name suggesting only currencies
Dim_Language uses char(50) for Name (fixed-width with trailing spaces) — unusual for a dimension column

upstream_wiki_coverage.Dictionary.*: Most Dictionary tables have upstream wikis in DB_Schema/etoro/Wiki/Dictionary/
upstream_wiki_coverage.BackOffice.*: BackOffice source tables have upstream wikis in DB_Schema/etoro/Wiki/BackOffice/
upstream_wiki_coverage.Billing.*: Billing source tables have upstream wikis in DB_Schema/etoro/Wiki/Billing/
upstream_wiki_coverage.UserApiDB.*: UserApiDB Dictionary tables (EvMatchStatus, ExtendedUserField) loaded via SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse
